generated_assessment.reasoning: The profile's very low openness to experience (24th percentile) and high neuroticism—especially anger/hostility (77th) and stress vulnerability (75th)—strongly suggest skepticism toward mainstream journalism, as conventional thinkers with elevated emotional reactivity tend to distrust institutional sources.
